name: ywc-agent-toolkit
description: Claude Code and Codex skills for development workflow automation, planning, specification, task generation, review, and delivery.

interface.shortDescription: Codex skills for planning, implementation, review, and delivery workflows.
interface.longDescription: YWC Agent Toolkit packages Codex skills that support structured software delivery: planning, specification writing, task generation, implementation support, reviews, pull requests, and release workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use $ywc-plan to clarify this change request and route it to the right workflow.
Use $ywc-task-generator to turn an approved specification into implementation tasks.
Use $ywc-sequential-executor to run generated tasks through delivery in order.
